---
name: Content improvement
about: Suggest improvements to challenge instructions, learning flow, or supporting docs.
title: "[Content]: "
labels: [enhancement, content]
assignees: []
---

## Challenge or area
Which challenge, doc page, or resource should be improved?

## Current gap
What is confusing, missing, outdated, or hard for participants to follow?

## Proposed improvement
Describe the change you recommend.

## Why this helps
Explain how the improvement would help participants, coaches, or organizers.

## Supporting references
Add links, screenshots, or examples if available.
